    intro v
    constructor
    · intro hv
      have : g v ∈ {u : U | f u ∈ B} := hv
      have : f (g v) ∈ B := this
      simpa [Function.comp, id] using (show v ∈ B from by simpa [hf] using this)
    · intro hv

  classical
  rcases h with ⟨f, hf⟩

  constructor

    apply Set.ext
    intro v
    constructor
    · intro hv
      rcases hv with ⟨u, huA, rfl⟩
      have huB : u ∈ B := by
        have : u ∈ A := huA
        simpa [hAB] using this
      exact ⟨u, huB, rfl⟩
    · intro hv
      rcases hv with ⟨u, huB, rfl⟩
      have huA : u ∈ A := by
        have : u ∈ B := huB
        simpa [hAB] using this
      exact ⟨u, huA, rfl⟩
  · intro S
    rcases hf.2 S with ⟨u, rfl⟩
    refine ⟨{u}, ?_⟩
    apply Set.ext
    intro v
    constructor
    · intro hv
      rcases hv with ⟨u', hu', hfu'⟩
      have : u' = u := by simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hu'
      subst this
      simpa using hfu'
    · intro hv
      refine ⟨u, ?_, hv⟩
      simp

rcases h with ⟨f, hf⟩

rcases h with ⟨f, hf⟩
  refine ⟨fun A : Set U => {v : V | ∃ u : U, A u ∧ f u = v}, ?_⟩
  refine ⟨?inj, ?surj⟩
  · intro A B hAB
    funext u
    constructor
    · intro hu
      have : (f u ∈ {v : V | ∃ u : U, A u ∧ f u = v}) := by
        refine ⟨u, hu, rfl⟩
      have : (f u ∈ {v : V | ∃ u : U, B u ∧ f u = v}) := by simpa [hAB] using this
      rcases this with ⟨u', hu', hfu'⟩
      have : u' = u := hf.1 hfu'
      simpa [this] using hu'
    · intro hu
      have : (f u ∈ {v : V | ∃ u : U, B u ∧ f u = v}) := by
        refine ⟨u, hu, rfl⟩
      have : (f u ∈ {v : V | ∃ u : U, A u ∧ f u = v}) := by simpa [hAB] using this
      rcases this with ⟨u', hu', hfu'⟩
      have : u' = u := hf.1 hfu'
      simpa [this] using hu'
  · intro S
    refine ⟨{u : U | S (f u)}, ?_⟩
    funext v
    constructor
    · intro hv
      rcases hf.2 v with ⟨u, rfl⟩
      exact ⟨u, hv, rfl⟩
    · rintro ⟨u, hu, rfl⟩
      exact hu
